antipattern.reason: Multi-hop failures hide from evaluation. Detector: type distribution skew > 80% in one class. Fix: r1-balance-types.

antipattern.description: Entire test set generated by LLM, no real-log queries.
antipattern.reason: Generator-style overfit; production drift undetected. Detector: source=real share == 0. Fix: r2-real-plus-synthetic.

antipattern.description: Frozen test set with 0% human spot-check.
antipattern.reason: Label noise leaks into baseline. Detector: human_checked=true share < 20%. Fix: r3-human-spotcheck-20pc.
